name: Backgammon Online
author: Poki
description: Backgammon Online brings the timeless classic Backgammon to your screen! Known as tawla, tavla, or Shesh Besh in different parts of the world, Backgammon is a beloved dice and board game that's been enjoyed for generations. Now, you can challenge the computer or a friend on the same device. Roll the dice, plan your moves, and race across the board to finish first! Whether you're a seasoned player or just discovering the game, there's no better time to show off your skills. Ready to get those dice rolling? Let's play some Backgammon! How to play Backgammon Online? Use your mouse to play the game. Who created Backgammon Online? Backgammon Online is created by Codethislab. How can I play Backgammon Online for free? You can play Backgammon Online for free on Poki. Can I play Backgammon Online on mobile devices and desktop? Backgammon Online can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets. Can I play Backgammon Online with my friend? Yes! Backgammon Online is a single or local multiplayer game so you can play with your friend at the same computer!
